title: Midnight Falafel Crumble
description: A twist on the classic falafel, crumbled and seasoned to perfection for a midnight snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine chickpeas, onion, garlic, falafel mix, paprika, and salt.
Mix well and mash slightly with a fork to create a crumbly texture.
Heat coconut oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the falafel mixture into the skillet.
Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the falafel to a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes.
While the falafel is baking, mix the crumble with a pinch of salt.
Once the falafel is done, remove from the oven and sprinkle with crumble.
